seoTitle: Merryvale vs Mexico — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Merryvale and Mexico. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Merryvale and Mexico.
heading: Merryvale vs Mexico — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Merryvale, Queensland and Mexico, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mexico has a lower overall climate risk score (25/100) compared to Merryvale (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Merryvale or Mexico safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Merryvale has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Mexico scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Merryvale scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Mexico scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Merryvale or Mexico?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mexico has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
